events.label: assistant
events.text: Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`. Summary: the smoke detector spacing/placement defect signals that installation proceeded without a field-verified, NFPA 72–compliant layout coordinated to actual ceiling conditions (beams, HVAC diffusers, obstructions) — a broken sequence. Called **fail / high risk**: halt further detector rough-in and ceiling close-in, correct spacing per NFPA 72 Ch. 17, and re-verify before rough-in inspection and AHJ acceptance testing; unaffected work (pull stations, panel programming prep, wiring in unaffected zones) can continue.
